title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 10 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 10 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 10 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/12/2025
Today, iron ore prices shi ed from weak to strong, with the main contract I2605 closing at 769, up 1.85% from the previous trading day.Traders showed strong willingness to support prices, while steel mills con nued to press for lower procurement prices. Market trading ac vity remained subdued. In Shandong, the transac on price for PB fines ranged from 780 to 790 yuan per ton, up 3-8 yuan per ton from the previous day.
